meaning: adj.[律]有效的,有根据的,正当的,正确的
examples: All tickets are valid for two months.
Our realty agent says the sales contract is valid.
This special offer is valid until the end of the month.
There was an ongoing battle with the U.S. Patent Office over whether that patent was valid.
Mr. GRAHAM: That was an interesting case because the court originally ruled that the law was valid.
